confirmation.feedbackAndEmail: Your feedback has been submitted and our product team will reach out shortly.

feedbackForm.additionalInstruction: Please do not include patient information.
feedbackForm.heading: How can we improve?
feedbackForm.prompt: At Medable, we aim to design products that align with your needs. Your feedback is valuable in shaping our product. Please provide your thoughts below.

uxSignupForm.heading: Would you like to join our design process?
